notes: Lane ownership: StatiBaker/docs/kanboard_runsheet_roadmap.md plus any new non-production StatiBaker runsheet fixture docs/tests. Do not own Kanboard RPC implementation. Assess the roadmap against current StatiBaker docs and status schema. Define malformed-status, duplicate-id, nested-subtask, and timeline_cases expectations. Use robust-context-fetch conventions if local docs conflict. Preferred models: gpt-5.1-codex-mini for narrow doc/test workers; gpt-5.1-codex-max only if schema coupling proves tricky.
